title: Faculty Senate sets start of fall 2027 semester for Sept. 2
summary_en: The amendment changes dates for finals and the grading deadline but does not change the dates for Thanksgiving recess or Winter 2027 Commencement.
title_cn: 教授评议会确定2027年秋季学期开学日期为9月2日

title: UW–Madison leadership seeks employee feedback on administrative services
summary_en: The 2026 Administrative Quality Satisfaction Survey invites employees to share confidential feedback on administrative services to help improve campus operations and employee experiences.
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校管理层就行政服务征求员工反馈

title: Office of the Vice Chancellor for Research announces changes to better support UW–Madison’s research enterprise
summary_en: Following extensive consultation, OVCR is looking to better align research priorities across campus, support university research and creative expression and offer improved services.
title_cn: 科研事务副校长办公室宣布调整举措 更好支持威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校科研事业

title: Regents recognize Mnookin’s service, contributions
summary_en: The Universities of Wisconsin Board of Regents adopted a resolution citing UW–Madison Chancellor Jennifer Mnookin's leadership in multiple areas ahead of her upcoming departure for Columbia University.
title_cn: 校董会表彰明诺金的履职贡献

title: The start of Terrace season
summary_en: After a long winter, the sunburst chairs are back on the Memorial Union Terrace.
